canonical_definition: The ability to manage and reason through incomplete, ambiguous, or underspecified user queries without premature commitment to incorrect answers.
papers: Dehumanizing Machines: Mitigating Anthropomorphic Behaviors in Text Generation Systems

definitions.text: The ability to manage and reason through incomplete, ambiguous, or underspecified user queries without premature commitment to incorrect answers.

relationships.paper: Dehumanizing Machines: Mitigating Anthropomorphic Behaviors in Text Generation Systems
relationships.evidence: Adversarial questions, which cannot be answered based on the information provided in the video, help assess whether models hallucinate responses or can reliably acknowledge uncertainty—a critical safety feature for assistive technologies.
